name: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
notes: Primary government shareholder. IDC submits quarterly performance reports and annual financial statements to the Ministry. Minister chairs the SOE Oversight Committee.

name: IDC Board of Directors
notes: Board meets quarterly. Audit, Risk, and Remuneration committees meet bi-monthly. Board composition: 3 executive directors, 5 independent non-executive directors.

name: Bank of Zambia
notes: Regulates ZANACO as a licensed commercial bank. IDC engages BoZ on ZANACO's NPL reduction plan and AML/CFT compliance progress.

name: Energy Regulation Board (ERB)
notes: Regulates ZESCO's tariffs and operating licence. IDC monitors ZESCO's ERB tariff application progress and licence renewal status.

name: Lusaka Securities Exchange (LuSE)
notes: ZCCM-IH is listed on LuSE. IDC as majority shareholder must comply with LuSE listing rules on disclosure and related-party transactions.

name: Deloitte Zambia
notes: External auditor for IDC consolidated financial statements. Engagement partner rotated in FY2023 per audit independence requirements.

name: Zambia Development Agency (ZDA)
notes: IDC collaborates with ZDA on attracting strategic investors for portfolio companies earmarked for privatisation and for the Lusaka Industrial Park development project.

name: Ministry of Energy
notes: Policy principal for ZESCO. IDC coordinates with Ministry of Energy on ZESCO's tariff application, load shedding reduction plan, and Kafue Gorge Lower commissioning.
